question: Set up the i4h workflow on this machine and tell me if any host requirements are missing.
ground_truth: This README Quick Run prompt routes to setup. The agent resolves the repo root, checks host prerequisites, runs workflows/agentic/setup.sh as needed, and reports missing requirements.
expected_behavior: checks host requirements such as uv, git, GPU driver, disk, and third-party checkout state
runs or prepares workflows/agentic/setup.sh from the repo root
reports missing requirements and verification results
